coverage_note: Bash script implementation; coverage measured via dedicated shell test suite (11/11 pass), not Vitest

unit_tests.note: All 207 existing Vitest test files pass. Additionally, 11/11 bash tests pass for rotate_logs().

test_cases: MAX_LOG_SIZE_MB and MAX_LOG_GENERATIONS constants are defined
rotate_logs is called with || echo WARNING pattern
chmod 640 for LOG_FILE is present after nohup [S4-005]
rotate_logs call is positioned before db:init and after chmod 755
No log file exists -> early return with exit code 0
Log file under threshold (5MB < 10MB) -> no rotation
Log file over threshold (15MB > 10MB) -> rotated to .1
Symlink guard [S4-006]: LOG_FILE is a symlink -> return 1
Symlink guard [S4-006]: generation file is a symlink -> return 1

commits: 40b6d32: feat(log-rotation): add server log rotation to build-and-start.sh
notes: TDD implementation complete for Issue #403. Bash script rotate_logs() function added to scripts/build-and-start.sh with: (1) MAX_LOG_SIZE_MB=10 and MAX_LOG_GENERATIONS=3 constants, (2) rotate_logs() function with symlink guards [S4-006] on all rotation targets, (3) POSIX-compliant wc -c size detection, (4) failure-safe || echo WARNING pattern for set -e compatibility, (5) chmod 640 [S4-005] after nohup for log file permissions, (6) PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST updated in both EN and JP versions. A dedicated bash test suite (11 tests) validates structural correctness and functional behavior including generation shift, symlink guards, and edge cases.
message: TDD implementation complete. All 11 bash tests pass. All 4388 Vitest unit tests pass. ESLint and TypeScript checks clean.
